log: REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Half-Elf — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:9+6=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Half-Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 52/67
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Half-Elf — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 31 damage. Half-Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 21/67

→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:15+3=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
